entry.title: ranking styles of how 'gay' they seem (BUT ITS NOT SERIOUS PLS) actually anyone can dress however! but throughout history queer fashion has been used to help show hints (esp when being openly queer isn't allowed, and queer community are often more open to

entry.title: Replying to @Emma⸆⸉ WAIT GUYS ALSO TRY COLOURING AND GOING OUTSIDE - maybe random tiktoks won't make you as mad! but actually i've been on tiktok long enough not care what people comment but i'm just surprised by the reaction (OVER A DANCE) bc i just tho
entry.content: Replying to @Emma⸆⸉ WAIT GUYS ALSO TRY COLOURING AND GOING OUTSIDE - maybe random tiktoks won't make you as mad! but actually i've been on tiktok long enough not care what people comment but i'm just surprised by the reaction (OVER A DANCE) bc i just tho
